traduccion.centroAyudaSubtitulo: Everything you need to know about your dashboards.
traduccion.escribenosDirectamente: Write to us directly and we will help you instantly.
traduccion.faq1q: What information can I see on my Home dashboard?
traduccion.faq1a: On your Home you have your summary of the day. You can see your total earnings, pending appointments, and your average rating.
traduccion.faq2q: Where do I check the comments left by clients?
traduccion.faq2a: In the "Reviews" panel you can see your large overall rating and read the opinions of each client in detail.
traduccion.faq3q: How does the Appointments system work?
traduccion.faq3a: In Appointments you will see client requests. Each card will show you the day, time, and status of the job.
traduccion.faq4q: How can I add or modify a service?
traduccion.faq4a: Go to "My Services". There you have a button to add new services with their name, price, and description, or edit the current ones.
traduccion.faq5q: How do I set my days off and schedules?
traduccion.faq5a: Go to "My Schedules". There you can turn on or off the days of the week you work and set your entry and exit time.
traduccion.faq6q: How can I update my details or description?
traduccion.faq6a: Go to "My Profile" and press edit. You will be able to change your name, contact phone, and your professional description.
traduccion.faq7q: How do I communicate with a client?
traduccion.faq7a: Use the "Chat" module to send messages in real-time to clients to coordinate service details.
traduccion.faq8q: How do I withdraw my earnings from the application?
traduccion.faq8a: Your earnings are automatically transferred to the bank account you registered every time you complete a service.
traduccion.faq9q: What happens if a client cancels at the last minute?
traduccion.faq9a: If the client cancels when you are already on your way, the system will compensate you with a base rate for the lost time.
traduccion.privacidadSec1Texto: By accessing and using the ProFinder Professional application, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of the terms, you may not use our services. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, with modifications being effective upon posting on the application.
traduccion.privacidadSec2Texto: As a registered professional, you agree to provide truthful, accurate, and up-to-date information regarding your credentials, experience, and offered services. Additionally, you must fully comply with scheduled appointments and maintain a professional and respectful demeanor at all times with clients who hire you through our platform.
traduccion.privacidadSec3Texto: ProFinder will process payments made by clients securely. You authorize ProFinder to deduct a service fee or commission of 10% for each job successfully completed through the platform. Net earnings will be automatically transferred to the bank account provided by you within the timeframes established in the payment policies.
traduccion.privacidadSec4Texto: We respect your privacy and protect your personal data in accordance with applicable data protection laws. The personal information and documents provided will be used exclusively for identity verification, payment processing, and enhancing the application experience. We will never sell your data to third parties.
traduccion.privacidadSec5Texto: We understand that unforeseen events can occur. In the event of cancellation by the client within 24 hours prior to the service, you will be compensated with a base cancellation fee. If you, as a professional, cancel the service, this may negatively affect your rating and ranking in searches.
traduccion.privacidadSec6Texto: All content included in the application, such as text, graphics, logos, button icons, and images, is the property of ProFinder or its content suppliers and is protected by international copyright laws. You may not reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, or exploit any portion of the application without our express consent.
traduccion.faltanDatosDesc: Please enter at least the street and neighborhood to search on the map.
traduccion.calleEncontradaDesc: We have taken you to your street. Now touch the map EXACTLY on your house to place the pin there.
traduccion.zonaEncontradaDesc: We have brought you closer to your area. Now touch the map EXACTLY on your house to place the pin there.
traduccion.noEncontradoDesc: That address was not found. Use the "📡 Use my current location" button or touch the map directly.
traduccion.ubicacionDetectadaDesc: The map has been centered on your current location. If you need to adjust, touch the map to move the pin.
traduccion.errorGpsDesc: Could not get your location. Make sure GPS is enabled and you have given permission in your browser.
traduccion.exitoUbicacionDesc: Your work location was saved successfully.
traduccion.notaMapaWeb: Note: The visual map may not display streets accurately, but don't worry, the data you write below will connect perfectly with Google Maps.
traduccion.ubicacionSubtitulo: Configure the address of your establishment so clients know where to go.
traduccion.mapaIndicacion: Touch the map to move the pin to your exact location
